title: Cyrtochiloides ochmatochila
intro: There is insufficient information available on Cyrtochiloides ochmatochila.
taxonomy: Cyrtochiloides ochmatochila is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus belongs to the subtribe Oncidiinae, which is a subtribe of the orchid family. Cyrtochiloides ochmatochila is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants for support. Its classification also places it within the tribe Cymbidieae, a group of orchids known for their unique flowers and growth habits. Cyrtochiloides ochmatochila is native to Central and South America, where it can be found in a variety of habitats.
